chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1574 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 10.02.2025 Mr. Mohsin Ali Khan, Special Prosecutor ANF SIP Saleem Akhtar of CRO Branch Karachi ------------------------------------ None appeared for applicant/accused, same was the position on the last date of hearing. Special Prosecutor ANF submits that three material witnesses have been examined by the trial Court, the case is at the verge of conclusion and is fixed for tomorrow. Since the case is at the verge of conclusion, instant criminal bail application is dismissed, with direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant/ accused expeditiously, preferably within a period of one month. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
